evals.prompt: Review this PR that changes 30 files and adds 800 lines across auth, API, and test directories
evals.expected_output: Flag high risk due to auth path changes, recommend splitting the PR, and note test coverage should be verified.

evals.prompt: Generate a review summary for a PR that fixes a SQL injection vulnerability in the payment module
evals.expected_output: Classify as critical risk, highlight security fix as positive, and recommend thorough review of the payment path.

evals.prompt: Should I auto-approve this 3-file PR that only changes test files with 95% coverage?
evals.expected_output: Approve since it meets auto-approve criteria (low risk, tests only, high coverage), but note if any critical path was touched.
